refnamediv.refpurpose: build specification tests function and vector of names

listitem.para: * auto_names = the tlist that associates a name to each specification test function
* auto_ltest = the list of options provided by the user (default: an empty list)
* test_func = the function which gathers the specification tests used by automatic()
* name_test = the name of the specification tests which will be used for the printings

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION From the specifications list given by the user, build the function test_func which performs these specification tests and the vector name_test of corresponding names.

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
